findings.title: Well-structured PR description with context
findings.reasoning: The PR description clearly explains the motivation, changes made, and testing approach.
findings.guidance: Keep up the excellent documentation practices.

findings.title: Missing error handling in Main.java
findings.reasoning: Empty catch block swallows exceptions silently, making debugging difficult.
findings.guidance: Log the exception or rethrow as a domain-specific exception.

suggestedDiffNotes.body: Replace empty catch with logging or rethrow.

findings.title: Commit messages follow conventional format
findings.reasoning: All commits follow the conventional commit format (feat:, fix:, etc.).

findings.title: PR scope is appropriately sized
findings.reasoning: Single-file documentation change is well-scoped and focused.

findings.title: Insufficient test coverage for new feature
findings.reasoning: New utility class has no unit tests, but the change is small and well-understood.
findings.guidance: Consider adding a basic smoke test for the utility method.
